documentation_evidence: The 2004-2005 Malawi Integrated Household Survey II covered the following topics: Household: - Characteristics and Composition of the Household - Education - Health - Time Use and Labor - Security and Safety - Housing - Consumption of Selected Food Over last 3 days - Consumption of Food over past one week - Non-Food Expenditures - Past 1 week and 1 month - Non-Food Expenditures - Past 3 months - Non-Food Expenditures - Past 12 months - Durables Goods - General Agriculture - Rain-fed Cultivation - Rain-fed Crop Sales - Tobacco - Dry Season (Dimba) Cultivation - Dry Season Crop Sales - Tree Crop Production and Sales - Livestock - Household Enterprises - Other Income - Gifts Received and Given - Social Safety Nets - Credit - Subjective Assessment of Well-being - Recent Shocks - Deaths in the Household - Child Anthropometry Community: - Community Identification - Roster of Informants - Ba...
